_comment: Source of truth for demo assets fetched from the public GitHub Release at build time. Each entry mirrors one file from labwired-core/releases/{release_tag}/ into public/wasm/. Bash side: packages/playground/scripts/fetch-demo-firmware.sh. TS side: packages/playground/src/bundled-configs.ts (which validates that every demoFirmwarePath has a matching entry here). Add a new demo by appending an entry below AND adding the matching BoardConfig.
